title: Rule Section Parser and fab_get_rule_sections
acceptance_criteria: Parser extracts requested sections by stable_id and section name.
Missing requested section returns empty content plus warning diagnostic.
No fallback to full rule content exists.
fab_get_rule_sections validates selection_token, ai_selected_stable_ids, ai_selection_reasons, and sections.
Invalid L1 selection and missing reasons are hard errors.

implementation.description: Write failing parser/service/tool tests for section extraction, token validation, required+AI selected merge, missing-section warning, and hard errors.
implementation.expected_failure: Tests fail because rule-sections service/tool do not exist.

implementation.description: Implement rule section parser, section retrieval service, fab_get_rule_sections tool, and registration.
Separate parser, token resolution, validation, and tool schema code; remove fab_get_rules registration after replacement coverage passes.
quality_checks: Old fab_get_rules is not registered if removal is in scope.
